sections.paragraph:
m., Job 30:7 Zep 2:9 pl. חֲרֻלִּים Pro 24:31, the nettle, so called from its burning, from the root חָרַל = חָרַד. Comp. Eth. አሕለለ፡ to singe, for አሕረረ፡ See Celsii Hierobot. t. ii. p. 166.

[“חֲרוּמַף (contracted from חֲרוּם אַף flat-nosed), [Harumaph], pr.n. of a man, Neh 3:10 ”].
